frontmatter.title: Birkhoff’s representation theorem for distributive lattices

mainmatter.p: The category of finite posets and monotone maps is anti-equivalent to the category of finite distributive lattices: a finite poset P is sent to the finite distributive lattice { \mathopen {} \left [ P , { \mathopen {} \left [ 1 \right ] \mathclose {}} \right ] \mathclose {}} of (decidable) downsets.
